coreMeaning.en: of or relating to the mind

coreMeaning.en: an experienced advisor who guides someone

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Mentor → 奥德修斯之子的老师，后泛指导师

coreMeaning.en: a list of food options; a list of computer options

coreMeaning.en: of or relating to trade and commerce

motivated only by money; a hired soldier

coreMeaning.en: a mentalist performer; a believer in mentalism

coreMeaning.cn: 梅赛德斯（人名/汽车品牌）

coreMeaning.cn: 进行丝光处理（第三人称单数）
